title: Multi-venue & multi-entity card management
text: Cards and spend managed per venue across separate legal entities and Xero files, with one consolidated view for head office.

title: Instant card issuance & manager handover
text: New managers get a working card in seconds; departing managers are cut off instantly, with no disruption to the venue.

title: Receipt capture & auto-coding at point of spend
text: Photographed at the moment of purchase, OCR-matched, and coded automatically — no more chasing paper at month-end.

title: Real-time budget enforcement
text: Per-venue, per-department or per-card limits enforced before spend happens, not reviewed after the fact.

title: Subscription management across venues
text: One place to see and manage every recurring charge scattered across every venue's cards.

title: Reimbursements for out-of-pocket spend
text: Staff who pay personally get reimbursed quickly, without falling outside the same coding and approval rules as card spend.

title: Multi-entity consolidated reporting
text: One dashboard for finance to see spend across every venue and entity, instead of stitching together separate files.
